skill_availability_goal: Verify release_verified only when tag and post-stamp Git trees match exactly and source-specific version forms normalize to the same SemVer.
prompt: 执行 fixture 中定义的 post-tag audit。从 pre-tag handoff 锚定的盖章后 commit 读取记录，并解析实际 `v1.2.0` tag commit；按 Git tree hash 语义判断快路径。只做最终复核，不重新生成内容或盖章。
